Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "SHIFTRIX-7800-1000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7800 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Shiftrix.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The routine at $7800 displays the intro. However, for it to display and play the music correctly, the following steps were taken: 1. Upon hitting the breakpoint at $7800, the memory between $7C00-$8C00 was dumped 2. Upon hitting the breakpoint at $1000, the memory dumped in step 1 was restored to $7C00 before dumping the game
